derived_controls: all executable tool paths should have pre-action and post-result guards
tool calls and guardrails should be traceable
legacy executors are supply-chain and tool-misuse risk surfaces
audit-only scans must not mutate executor logic

sources.claim: OpenAI Agents documentation includes guardrails/human review, results/state, tools/integrations and observability surfaces.
OpenAI Agents SDK tool guardrails wrap function tools and validate/block tool calls before and after execution.
OpenAI Agents SDK tracing records agent events including tool calls, handoffs, guardrails, and custom events.
OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications 2026 is the reference risk model for agentic applications.
LangGraph durable execution persists workflow step state to resume without reprocessing completed work.
